What Can I Use at Home to Unclog a Drain?

What Can I Use at Home to Unclog a Drain? You can use baking soda and vinegar, salt and hot water, or a plunger to unclog a drain.

Read More →
Bathroom Faucet Bathroom Sink Bathtub Blog Garbage Disposal Kitchen Faucet Kitchen Sink Shower Sump Pump Toilet Water Filtration Water Heaters 2025-03-12

What Is the Average Life Expectancy of a Water Heater?

What Is the Average Life Expectancy of a Water Heater? Traditional tank water heaters tend to last between 8 to 12 years, while tankless water heaters have a longer lifespan of 15 to 20 years.

Read More →
Bathroom Faucet Bathroom Sink Bathtub Blog Garbage Disposal Kitchen Faucet Kitchen Sink Shower Sump Pump Toilet Water Filtration Water Heaters 2025-03-11

Why Won't My Sump Pump Stop Running

Why Won't My Sump Pump Stop Running? Your sump pump may be running continuously due to a stuck float switch, a faulty check valve, a high water table, a clogged or frozen discharge pipe, or a pump that's too small or improperly installed.

Read More →

Can Drain Cleaner Damage Pipes?

Can Drain Cleaner Damage Pipes? Yes, most drain cleaners contain harsh chemicals that can corrode and erode the pipes in your plumbing system.

Read More →

What Can You Put in Your Garbage Disposal?

What Can You Put in Your Garbage Disposal? Small food scrap, but avoid the fibrous ones as it can damage your disposal
